signals.reasoning: Keep managing the live MON short. It remains solidly profitable, retains about 76% of peak P&L, and is no longer under giveback pressure.
BTC is constructive but still lacks enough edge to outrank the better caution-mode setups.
ETH is improving, but not enough to justify a fresh trade while the event state is still caution.
SOL remains one of the better reduced-confidence longs because mechanics are bullish and funding is supportive for continuation.
STBL remains a clean bearish fade because funding is extremely positive, crowding is high, and the tape still looks vulnerable to reversal.
HMSTR is too illiquid and noisy to be a serious setup despite mild momentum.
MAVIA is another clean fade because funding is strongly positive, crowding is high, and the market quality is poor enough that upside continuation is suspect.
HEMI has some movement but not enough clean edge or quality to justify action here.
STRK has momentum, but the setup is too average to outrank stronger names on either side.
BANANA remains a valid squeeze-style long because mechanics are strong and funding is deeply negative, though caution keeps confidence moderated.
DASH remains a good reduced-confidence long because the board is bullish and funding is materially negative enough to support continuation.
